name: external-agent-orchestrator
description: Delegate implementation to Claude Code and specialized verification to Antigravity while Codex retains planning and acceptance control.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding to CC and verification to AGY.
interface.longDescription: A local, contract-driven worker broker that keeps Codex in charge of project planning and final acceptance while Claude Code implements and Antigravity performs targeted investigation or verification.
defaultPrompt: Plan this change, delegate implementation to CC, and verify it.
Ask AGY to investigate this failure without duplicating implementation.
